SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.data

Interface Storable

All Known Subinterfaces:
AwtImage, DataRetainingImage, FxImage, Image
All Known Implementing Classes:
AwtMutableImage, AwtStandardImage, FxDataRetainingImage, FxMutableImage, FxWrappedImage, ImageBuffer, MutableImage
public interface Storable
A common interface for storable objects.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    defaultExtension()
    The standard file extension for this type of object.
    String
    mimeType()
    Get the MIME type of this object.
    void
    write(OutputStream out)
    Writes the object to the specified OutputStream.

  • Method Details

    • defaultExtension

      String defaultExtension()
      The standard file extension for this type of object.
      Returns:
      the file extension

    • mimeType

      String mimeType()
      Get the MIME type of this object.
      Returns:
      the MIME type

    • write

      void write(OutputStream out) throws IOException
      Writes the object to the specified OutputStream.
      Parameters:
      out - the OutputStream to which the object will be written
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing to the stream
